hero_h1_span: Effective and precise solutions for the nuclear industry
hero_p: We specialise in custom orders for the nuclear industry, hospitals and laboratories. We carry out projects based on our clients' specifications. Our 25 years of experience helps in selecting the right solutions, and our team's work can be found in laboratories and medical facilities across Poland and Europe.
hero_sub: We also offer CNC machining and casting of lead and zinc products.
about_p1: PROSZ-MET Sp. z o.o. is a Polish industrial company based in Trzebinia (Lesser Poland), operating since 2001. The company draws on long metallurgical traditions and continuously develops its competences.
about_p2: We specialise in casting lead and its alloys, as well as zinc and its alloys, the production of radiological shields, and machining. We are open to fulfilling individual, non-standard orders.
offer_card1_p: We specialise in precision casting of lead, including low-activity lead, and its alloys. We fulfil both series and individual orders in accordance with the client's technical documentation.
offer_card2_p: We design and manufacture comprehensive lead radiological shields – containers, bricks, shapes and custom elements for X-ray rooms, nuclear medicine and the nuclear industry. We also use low-activity lead.
offer_card3_p: We perform precision turning, milling and grinding of metal components on modern CNC and conventional machines.
offer_card4_p: We produce zinc and aluminium anodes for cathodic protection of metal structures and installations in aquatic environments. We protect ships, port and underwater installations from electrochemical corrosion.
offer_card5_p: A lead ballast is the part of a yacht hull made of lead, designed to lower the centre of gravity, increasing the yacht's resistance to heeling. We manufacture ballasts to individual specifications.
offer_card6_p: We manufacture shielding containers used in nuclear technology, containers for radiopharmaceuticals and baskets for radioactive waste.
offer_card7_p: We perform grinding of entrusted materials, including ferroalloys. We specialise in grinding explosive materials and producing ground aluminium-magnesium powder used in military production.
offer_card8_p: We carry out individual projects according to client specifications. Technical consultation and material selection included. Prototypes and small series available.
projects_p: Selected projects completed for clients from Poland and abroad. Every project combines engineering precision with experience.
project1_desc: A complete shielding set for a radiation detector. Components cast from lead according to the client's documentation.
project2_desc: Lead bricks with tongues and grooves (dovetail) for building shielding walls. Also available in low-activity lead.
project3_desc: Precision-made lead sieve dedicated for a nuclear reactor, produced to strict technical documentation.
project4_desc: Lead components for a linear accelerator with full documentation. Plates and shapes made to the highest dimensional precision.
project5_desc: Container measuring 530×530 mm, height 250 mm, with stainless steel casing, lined with 6 mm lead sheet. Designed for storing radioactive waste. Produced for a French laboratory.
project6_desc: Containers for radiopharmaceuticals used in medical diagnostics (PET, SPECT). Manufactured to precision meeting medical industry requirements.
project7_desc: Mobile lead screens and shields for medical and laboratory personnel. Lightweight construction for easy repositioning.
project8_desc: Specialist baskets for safe storage and transport of radioactive waste, manufactured in accordance with industry standards.
project9_desc: Zinc and aluminium anodes produced for the electrochemical and marine industries. The photo shows a vessel after a refit during which anodes manufactured at Prosz-Met were installed.
fb_cta_title: This is only part of our work
fb_cta_desc: We regularly post photos and updates from our latest projects on Facebook. Follow us to stay up to date with what's coming out of our workshop.
bricks_desc: Our bricks are available in a full range of types and sizes. Production of bricks in non-standard dimensions and from low-activity lead is also possible – please contact our Sales Department.

footer_about_p: Radiological shield manufacturing, lead and zinc casting, machining. Trzebinia, Lesser Poland. Follow our latest projects on Facebook.
